results.title: So I was fired because my side door was broken and I left it open a ...
results.content: Don't drive with it open, it can break the door. The one that don't slide easy, are the ones that are almost broken or have been broken.

results.title: SIDEDOOR - Updated July 2026 - 952 Photos & 905 Reviews - Yelp
results.content: Loved this place! Our cheese platter was amazing and so were the entrees. We had prime rib and salmon and shared them. Staff was super friendly and patient.

# Corona Del Mar, Cocktails, craft beer and award winning food in a relaxed environment.

Make a reservation or simply come on in! We are now accepting walk-ins.

## SideDoor

### Three generations of the Frank family found new inspiration in England’s growing gastropub movement.
